tasks.description: Improvement ideas tracker — data layer: migration 022 (improvement_ideas table with improvement_status + improvement_priority enums), TypeScript types, API routes (GET filterable + POST + PATCH + DELETE), client wrappers
acceptance_criteria: New migration 022_improvement_ideas.sql creates improvement_status enum (proposed/approved/in_progress/completed/rejected) and improvement_priority enum (low/medium/high/critical)

improvement_ideas table: id UUID PK, workspace_id UUID NOT NULL FK workspaces ON DELETE CASCADE, title TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, status improvement_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'proposed', priority improvement_priority NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium', linked_step_id UUID FK steps ON DELETE SET NULL, linked_touchpoint_id UUID FK touchpoints ON DELETE SET NULL, linked_section_id UUID FK sections ON DELETE SET NULL, created_by UUID FK users NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
RLS enabled: SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE policies using can_access_workspace(workspace_id)
Index on workspace_id, update_updated_at trigger reused from migration 015
TypeScript types added to database.ts: ImprovementIdea interface, ImprovementStatus type, ImprovementPriority type
GET /api/v1/improvement-ideas?workspace_id=X returns all ideas for workspace, supports optional status and priority query params for filtering, ordered by created_at desc
POST /api/v1/improvement-ideas creates new idea with validation (workspace_id required, title required non-empty, status must be valid enum, priority must be valid enum, linked_*_id optional)
PATCH /api/v1/improvement-ideas/[id] updates idea (title, description, status, priority, linked_*_id). EDITABLE_FIELDS pattern.
DELETE /api/v1/improvement-ideas/[id] deletes idea with .select().single() pattern for 0-row detection
All mutation routes call void logActivity() with appropriate action (created/updated/deleted)
Client wrappers in client.ts: fetchImprovementIdeas(workspaceId, filters?), createImprovementIdea(data), updateImprovementIdea(id, data), deleteImprovementIdea(id)

patterns_to_follow: Migration pattern: CREATE TYPE enums, CREATE TABLE, update_updated_at trigger, workspace_id INDEX, RLS with can_access_workspace() — see 019_coloring_rules.sql
API route pattern: auth check, validation guards, EDITABLE_FIELDS for PATCH, .select().single() for DELETE, void logActivity() — see coloring-rules routes
Client wrapper pattern: apiFetch<Type[]> for list, apiFetch<Type> for create/update/delete — see existing wrappers in client.ts
Type pattern: interface + string literal union type for enums — see ColoringRule, CriteriaType in database.ts
FK with ON DELETE SET NULL for linked entity IDs (step, touchpoint, section) — allows deleting source entities without cascade-deleting improvement ideas
learnings_relevant: Supabase RLS silent mutations — API routes must check if data is null after mutations and return 403/404
apiFetch unwraps envelope — client functions return apiFetch<T>() directly
void logActivity() — fire-and-forget with void prefix to avoid floating promises

tasks.special_instructions: Next migration number is 022. Reuse update_updated_at() trigger function from migration 015 (DO NOT recreate). Follow coloring_rules migration as closest pattern. linked_step_id, linked_touchpoint_id, linked_section_id should all be nullable FK with ON DELETE SET NULL so deleting a source entity orphans the idea rather than deleting it.

tasks.description: Replace native confirm() for perspective deletion in settings page with Radix Dialog, following IMP-051 delete workspace dialog pattern
acceptance_criteria: PerspectivesSection.handleDelete no longer calls native confirm()
Radix Dialog shows perspective name in description text
Cancel (secondary variant) and Delete (destructive/red variant) buttons in dialog footer
Dialog explains consequences: 'All annotations for this perspective will be permanently removed.'
Zero native confirm() calls remain in settings/page.tsx after fix

patterns_to_follow: IMP-051 pattern already in same file — confirmDeleteOpen state, handleConfirmDelete, Radix Dialog with DialogContent/DialogHeader/DialogTitle/DialogDescription/DialogFooter
IMP-028 clone dialog pattern also in same file — confirmCloneOpen

tasks.special_instructions: The file already has two Radix Dialog patterns (clone and delete workspace). Follow the identical pattern for perspective deletion. Need confirmDeletePerspectiveOpen state + perspectiveToDelete state to track which perspective is being deleted. Also resolves IMP-054 (same issue).

tasks.description: Add axis tick marks or grid lines to prioritization quadrant chart for better score readability
acceptance_criteria: Subtle grid lines at 25%, 50%, 75% positions (horizontal and vertical) within the chart area
Numeric labels 1-5 along left edge (impact) and bottom edge (effort) of chart
Grid lines use border-subtle or similar low-opacity color that doesn't compete with dots
Existing quadrant labels, dots, tooltips, and filters still work correctly

patterns_to_follow: Chart uses CSS absolute positioning within relative container — grid lines should be positioned the same way
Design tokens: --border-subtle for grid lines, --text-tertiary for axis labels
Keep axis labels outside chart area to avoid overlapping dots

tasks.special_instructions: CSS-only enhancement. No new dependencies. Grid lines positioned at 25%, 50%, 75% of chart width/height (mapping to scores 2, 3, 4 on the 1-5 scale). Use very subtle styling — dashed or dotted lines at low opacity.

shared_files.note: database.ts and client.ts are owned exclusively by slot 1. No other slot needs to modify them.

testing_plan.regression_reason: Risk score 4 from iteration 106 (8 files changed, shared components modified: step-detail-panel, touchpoint-detail-panel, sidebar, workspace-shell)
